description: A top-tier loyalty member wants to use their annual benefit to gift Gold status to a family member.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the member's loyalty profile and confirm they have an unused 'Gift Status' benefit available.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the member is eligible to gift status.

nodes.task_description: Collect the name and email address of the family member who will receive the gifted status.
Process the status gift, upgrading the recipient's account to Gold and marking the benefit as used on the primary member's account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the request, and the recipient's account is upgraded.
